arts.ttl: Unai Emery fumes at Aston Villa penalty call and makes honest Liverpool admission
arts.sum: Unai Emery reacts to his Aston Villa side's 2-0 Premier League defeat to Liverpool at Anfield

arts.ttl: Steve McManaman offers Trent Alexander-Arnold advice amid Real Madrid transfer dilemma
arts.sum: Former Liverpool star Steve McManaman left the club for Real Madrid in 1999, and right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold has been linked with an identical move in the summer

arts.ttl: Arne Slot rejects Man City claim after Liverpool make defending champions pay
arts.sum: Reaction from Arne Slot as Liverpool go five points clear of Manchester City at the top of the Premier League table

arts.ttl: How Liverpool exploited 'oceans of space' against Villa
arts.sum: Match of the Day's Micah Richards and Alan Shearer look at how Liverpool broke to exploit space left by Aston Villa, who lost 2-0 at Anfield.

arts.ttl: 'Now we are candidates' - classy Liverpool take early title control
arts.sum: Liverpool have taken early control of the Premier League title race, but Alexis Mac Allister says he didn't think they would be contenders at the start of the season.

arts.ttl: Slot is not Klopp, but his Liverpool side could emulate the 2019-20 champions
arts.sum: Arne Slot is trying to create his own identity as the head coach of Liverpool, and so far, it has paid off with a great start to the season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool go 5 pts clear but worried by Trent injury
arts.sum: Arne Slot admitted his concern at Trent Alexander-Arnold limping out of Liverpool's 2-0 win against Aston Villa with a suspected hamstring injury after just 25 minutes, saying that it is "always serious if a player goes off in the first-half."

arts.ttl: Arne Slot provides Trent Alexander-Arnold Liverpool injury update amid Real Madrid concern
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot delivers an update on the injury that forced Trent Alexander-Arnold off the pitch in Saturday's 2-0 Premier League win over Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Boss Arne Slot says champions’ loss did not give Liverpool an extra edge
arts.sum: The Reds moved five points clear at the top of the Premier League with victory over Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah achieves major European landmark in Liverpool win over Aston Villa
arts.sum: Liverpool's Mohamed Salah becomes the first player in Europe's big five leagues to hit 10 goals and 10 assists this season in the Reds' 2-0 win over Aston Villa.
